home.heroDescription: A charming country inn in the heart of the Bourbonnais. Comfortable rooms, a welcoming restaurant and events throughout the year.
home.descriptbar: A welcoming bar with a friendly atmosphere.
home.descriptresto: Traditional cuisine and locally sourced ingredients.
home.descripthotel: Comfortable rooms for a relaxing stay.
home.descriptevent: Concerts, themed dinners and many other events.
home.descript1: For many years, our inn has welcomed travellers, families and business guests in a warm and friendly atmosphere.
home.descript2: Enjoy traditional cuisine, comfortable rooms and a peaceful setting in the heart of the Bourbonnais countryside.
home.DescripUniver: Auberge de Saint-Aubin welcomes you with three unique experiences: accommodation, traditional dining and memorable events.
home.carteRestoDescrip: Fresh local produce, daily specials and a warm, friendly atmosphere.
home.carteHotelDescrip: Cosy rooms in the heart of the Bourbonnais region.
home.carteEventDescrip: Karaoke, themed dinners and events organised throughout the year.
